GLOBAL::en.title: Google Faces Demands to Prohibit AI Videos for Kids on YouTube
GLOBAL::en.summary: Google is facing demands to prohibit AI-generated videos for kids on YouTube due to concerns over their impact on children's development and safety. The company is being urged to take action to protect young users from potentially harmful content.
GLOBAL::en.why_it_matters: This story matters because it highlights the need for AI companies to prioritize child safety and consider the potential consequences of their products on vulnerable users.
